title: PRD: Workspace adoption superpower
problem_summary: ProductOS is still weak at converting an existing notes-first product workspace into first-class ProductOS artifacts and lifecycle state without manual restructuring.
outcome_summary: ProductOS can adopt a workspace such as CodeSync, infer the initial artifact set, persist it into a runnable ProductOS workspace, and surface uncertainty through explicit review queues instead of leaving the work trapped in notes.
scope_summary: Add a bounded workspace-adoption path that classifies arbitrary product files, builds intake routing, infers first-pass discovery artifacts, creates one canonical lifecycle item, persists the results, and emits an adoption report plus review queue.
